title: Richards, Robinson injuries leave U.S. shorthanded
summary: The U.S. men's soccer team faces injury troubles ahead of friendlies against Belgium and Portugal. Miles Robinson will miss both matches due to a groin injury, while Chris Richards is likely to sit out with a knee problem. The absences significantly weaken the team's defensive options.

Ces absences affaiblissent considérablement les options défensives de l'équipe.
